# UC-22.57.6 · SG Cyber Act annual cybersecurity exercise + Exercise Cyber Star participation tracker

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Resilience, Governance &middot; **Wave:** Crawl &middot; **Status:** Verified

*Once a year, every important Singapore system must practice handling a cyber crisis — preferably together with the national-level exercise. We track who did it and whether they've closed every follow-up task.*

---

## Description

Tracks annual exercise currency, after-action evidence, corrective-action closure, and CSA Exercise Cyber Star participation.

## Value

CSA Commissioner expects annual exercise. Cyber Star participation is the gold standard.

## Implementation

(1) Populate `csa_exercise_lookup` after each exercise. (2) Schedule UC-22.57.6 daily. (3) Build `CSA Cyber Exercise Ledger` dashboard.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.57.6` archived daily to `audit_evidence` with `csa_clause="CSA-CII-s16"`.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Set `last_exercise_date` to 400 days ago. UC-22.57.6 MUST flag.

### Negative scenario

Exercise within 365 days with after-action + corrective actions closed. UC-22.57.6 MUST NOT escalate.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

Similar to UC-22.56.7.

## Step 1 — Exercise register

```ini
[csa_exercise_lookup]
field.cii_id = string
field.last_exercise_date = number
field.exercise_type = string
field.exercise_lead = string
field.after_action_doc_url = string
field.csa_exercise_star_participation = string
field.csa_notified_at = number
```

## Step 2 — Schedule

```ini
[UC-22.57.6: CSA Cyber Exercise Ledger]
cron_schedule = 53 12 * * *
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.57.6,reg=SG-Cyber-Act,clause=CSA-CII-s16
alert.severity = 3
```

## Step 3 — Runbooks

**`exercise_status=overdue`**: schedule exercise within 60 days; produce after-action within 90.

**SG-specific failure modes**:
- **CSA Exercise Cyber Star coordination**: typically every 2 years; participation should be prioritised when offered.
- **Sector-specific exercises**: MAS BCP / IDA TT-CERT exercises may also count if scope covers CSA.

## SPL

```spl
| inputlookup csa_exercise_lookup
| eval days_since_exercise = round((now() - last_exercise_date) / 86400, 0)
| join type=left cii_id [search index=itsm sourcetype="snow:ir_ca" csa_cii_id=* | stats count as ca_open_count count(eval(ca_due_date < now() AND state="open")) as ca_overdue_count by csa_cii_id | rename csa_cii_id as cii_id]
| eval exercise_status = case(
    days_since_exercise > 365, "overdue",
    days_since_exercise > 335, "due_soon",
    isnull(after_action_doc_url), "after_action_missing",
    ca_overdue_count > 0, "corrective_actions_overdue",
    1=1, "current")
| table cii_id last_exercise_date days_since_exercise exercise_type csa_exercise_star_participation after_action_doc_url ca_open_count ca_overdue_count exercise_status
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) Exercise status by CII. (Panel 2) Days-since-exercise. (Panel 3) Cyber Star participation. (Panel 4) Open corrective actions.

## Known False Positives

1. **Cross-sector exercise**: a CSA cross-sector exercise may count for all participating CIIs; pin in lookup.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `csa_22_57_6_exceptions`.

## References

- [Cybersecurity Act 2018 §16](https://sso.agc.gov.sg/Act/CA2018?ProvIds=pr16-)
- [CSA Exercise Cyber Star](https://www.csa.gov.sg/our-programmes/national-cybersecurity-strategy/exercise-cyber-star)
